commit f2b6188 — baseline runner code complete + compiles. SDL fixture ~1.48MB / ~370k tokens (≈2× Sonnet 4.6 context). Live trial execution gated on valid ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (current env value returns 401). Once key works, single `make bench-baseline` populates results/baseline.jsonl.

commit 02b5711 — cmd/aggregate + 8 tests. Renders summary.md + summary.json with compression, cost, latency, success rate, failure modes. Special-cases baseline-DNF (∞ compression). Decision rule encoded.
commit c6ec7c1 — bench README rewritten with real numbers + decision rule + architecture tree; top-level README links the bench section. Results table left as placeholder pending first live trial.
commit 85e433e — directory tree, Makefile (bench/bench-baseline/bench-scry/bench-summary/bench-clean/bench-fixtures), README with go/no-go rule, separate go.mod to isolate runner deps

commit faa5953 — scry runner + minimal stdio MCP client. Smoke against live GitHub v4: scry indexes 1756 types/7115 units in 4.3s, all 11 tools register cleanly. Live trials gated on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
commit 0366f00 — task package with prompt/scorer/parser + 7 passing unit tests; cmd/record-fixtures wrote fixtures/expected.json (5 PRs: 50,58,59,60,64) against live GitHub

commit 6221f1c — Client.DenyFields + Scope.DeniedFieldMatchers + 12 unit tests. All pattern shapes (Type.field, *.field, Type.*) and rejection modes covered. BuildScope returns (Scope, error); callers updated.
commit 73c5a1f — WalkFieldSelections + 9 unit tests covering plain, alias, inline fragment, fragment spread, nested, multiple operations, introspection skip, recursive guard, nil doc.

commit 34dcc97 — checkDeniedFields helper + wiring into query_execute (post-validate, pre-cost-gate) + query_validate. 8 integration tests covering trips, passthrough, alias bypass attempt, no-scope passthrough, audit chain recording, wildcard, dedupe. All pass, 0 lint issues, full test suite green.
shipped alongside cache_stats in commit a50a3d3 — Purge() method on Cache + cache_purge admin-gated tool + entries_purged accounting + test coverage.
commit a50a3d3 — Stats counters + cache_stats MCP tool + 4 tests. Admin-gated, hit_rate computed, disabled cache rendering.

shipped alongside helm-publish in commit 112e9b4 — deploy/k8s/ with namespace, secret, deployment, service, ingress samples + README explaining apply order. Mirrors charts/scry/ defaults so kubectl diff stays small.

commit 25b9806 — goreleaser dockers + docker_manifests for ghcr.io multi-arch (amd64+arm64) + Dockerfile.release (distroless static, non-root) + release.yml wired with QEMU/Buildx/login-action. Validated via `goreleaser check`.

commit 505a3b2 — charts/scry/ with Chart.yaml + values.yaml + 7 templates (deployment, service, secret, ingress, podmonitor, pvc, _helpers + NOTES). Full configurability: image/tag, transport/listen, cost/cache/budget knobs, serversYaml inline-or-existingSecret, envFromSecrets for token-ref resolution, distroless securityContext, optional ingress/podMonitor/persistence.
commit 112e9b4 — helm-publish.yml workflow with chart-releaser-action publishing to gh-pages, stamps Chart.yaml version+appVersion from git tag, helm lint gate.

commit 0847553 — sessionFromContext returns "<tenant>:<identity>" so gate Stats/Chain/VerifyChainForSession scope per-tenant transparently. Filename sanitisation keeps files glob-friendly by tenant prefix. Tests updated, all packages green, 0 lint.

commit 86edb71 — Client.Tenant + Scope.Tenant + TenantOf() + TenantsDir + LoadTenant + MergeTenant. 8 tests cover name validation, path-traversal rejection, missing/present overlays, insecure perms, merge precedence, nil safety, default fallback.

commit 4de7ee5 — TenantFromContext helper resolves scope.TenantOf() or auth.DefaultTenant. 3 unit tests. Threat-model docs explain why X-Scry-Tenant header override is intentionally not supported (bearer-as-identity model).
commit 7840d87 — OAuth2Config + Validate + NewOAuth2TokenSource + skewedSource wrapper + 5 unit tests covering validation, issuance, in-validity caching, skew-driven refresh, nil-token handling.

no-op — internal/pq/store.go already has `name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE` schema + Put(name,query), GetByName, GetByHash, List sorted by name. Earlier cycle (v0.4) shipped named PQs at storage level. Tool-surface gap addressed in v07-pq-named-tool.

commit c3217b0 — query_execute name arg + three-way exclusivity (query/hash/name) + GetByName path + pq_not_found envelope for name miss. 4 new tests cover happy path, not_found, and two conflict modes. CLI scry pq add already supported names.

commit 6779fe0 — findPageInfo + mergePageNodes + auto-pagination loop with max_pages clamp. 7 new tests covering helpers and end-to-end cursor traversal across 3 pages, max_pages enforcement, no-pageInfo no-op. All 0-issue lint, 10/10 packages green.
commit f8afc39 — select arg + applyJMESPath helper + 8 unit tests. invalid_select envelope distinct from invalid_query. Cache stores projected form.
commit 3e805de — BuildEdges + ReplaceNeighbors + Neighbors store API + 7 unit tests. Persist-on-refresh wired into runtime/manager.go.
commit 66fc478 — schema_neighbors MCP tool + 3 tests covering incoming/outgoing, not_found, limit-clamp.

commit 5083314 — runInit covers both interactive + non-interactive modes in a single function. Wired into main switch + usage text. Idempotent overwrite via --yes; introspection probe surfaces warnings without failing the entry write.

commit 0241fda — printMCPSnippet emits paste-ready JSON for Claude Desktop / Cursor / Claude Code at end of interactive init. Uses os.Executable() so the printed command path matches the just-installed binary.

shipped alongside interactive in commit 5083314 — --yes flag in runInit toggles non-interactive mode in same function. Validates upstream URL, requires --upstream + (--token|--no-token), idempotent overwrite.

commit a920ba3 (+ b253d87 lint fix) — 11 tool descriptions migrated to constants in tool_descriptions.go with Examples: blocks. Covers list_servers, schema_search/get, query_validate/cost/execute, schema_diff, auth_status/login, gate_status/chain.
